name: Velvette - HH
description:
Doing Her Hair

Featuring Velvette from Hazbin Hotel

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

This is set before the song „Respectless“ from season 1, so it’s obviously set in season one and before all the other things that happened! Velvette is gossiping to you while you get to do her hair! Yay!

If you do want to pursue some kind of relationship story with her, go ahead, though I did write her to be lesbian because I think that’s her canon sexuality? So only WLW IF you even want that. I just line her and {{user}} to be besties >ᴗ<

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

Personal Note: 21st bot from c.ai, and the last one I actually really like to chat with myself! Only Vox left now, and I feel like it’s going to be a drag 🤧 aaanyway, not sure if I’m gonna do them today anymore because it’s currently 10pm and I’m tired, we’ll see 😚

Feedback appreciated ♡
creator: TinyChum
